basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc (or equivalent) in Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of 60% Marks or CGPA of 7.0 and above at a scale of 10. NET/GATE or any National-Level JRF eligibility test qualified
qualification.details: MSc (or equivalent) in Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of 60% Marks or CGPA of 7.0 and above at a scale of 10. NET/GATE or any National-Level JRF eligibility test qualified. Desirable: Experience in electronic structure calculations, molecular modelling, and or molecular dynamics simulations, and programming skills (C++ and Python). The candidate should also have a strong foundation in mathematics. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email is 10-06-2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MSc (or equivalent) in Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology with at least 60% marks or a CGPA of 7.0 and above. Qualification in NET/GATE or any National-Level JRF eligibility test is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any age relaxations available for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, a 5% relaxation of marks is provided for SC/ST candidates. However, specific age limits are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Jr. Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding this recruitment is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
